subcodes.title: MANUMAALO O TE FAKATOKAAGA
subcodes.first_line:
## MANUMAALO O TE FAKATOKAAGA

E lavea ne Koe, O toku Atua, me ne aofia pefea a Au taugasoa fakapelepele ne latou ko la
subcodes.notes: Author: BH (Bahá'u'lláh). Victory of the Covenant prayer 1 (section MANUMAALO O TE FAKATOKAAGA). Not found in inventory.
